description: Capability for the main window. F14 (tauri-scaffold) registers zero custom commands, so this grants only Tauri's standard core baseline (app/window/event basics) -- no fs, shell, http, or dialog access. Later features (F15/F17/F18/F21) add exactly the permission their own new command needs, reviewed by .claude/agents/tauri-capability-reviewer.md (ACCEPTANCE G3).
